calendar.matters:
Petitioner'S Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Oct-19-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
For respondent and opposing party California Employment Development Department: Susan J. King, Esq. Office of the Attorney General, 455 Golden Gate Avenue, #11000, San Francisco, CA 94102, 415-703-5718.
No appearance by plaintiff and moving party Gutierrez.

Ruling:
The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Petitioner Antonio G. Gutierrez Petition For Writ Of Mandate is GRANTED - case remanded to EDD for further hearings which accommodate 1) Petitioner's language requirements, and 2) evidence proffered by petitioner, but refused by Board. Petitioner to prepare order. Reported by Christina Paxton, CSR #1558 (301/JLW/dm)
